title: Lemon meringue – sweet and lovely

seo.title: Lemon meringue - sweet and lovely - Marinda Kook

html:
I won't exactly call myself a baker. I prefer cooking. Tomorrow evening it's Bible study for my husband's group at our house, so I need to make something sweet. This tart is so easy that even you can make it.

  1. 1 packet tennis biscuits
  2. 125 ml melted butter ( half a cup)
  3. 1 tin condensed milk
  4. 125 ml lemon juice ( half a cup)
  5. 3 eggs plus one egg white ( I like my meringue high)
  6. 100 ml castor sugar

NOW:

  • crush or chop the biscuits fine and mix them with the melted butter ( I melt my butter in a cup in the microwave)
  • spray a tart pan with spray and cook and press the biscuit mixture into the tart pan – put it in the fridge for half an hour
  • pour the condensed milk into a mixing bowl
  • separate the eggs and whisk the egg yolks lightly with a fork and add to the condensed milk
  • now add the lemon juice and whisk it until it thickens
  • scrape it out onto your tart crust
  • in a clean bowl with a clean whisk, beat your egg whites to soft-peak stage, then whisk in your castor sugar
  • spread the meringue on top of your condensed milk mixture in the tart pan
  • bake for 20 minutes at 150 degrees Celsius

Now look, even I stood back proudly today and looked at it.
